The cross sections of the reactions (gamma,p),
by use of tagged photon beam. Protons emitted at
theta-p = 30 degr. were measured by a magnetic
spectrometer, and the other neutrons or protons were
measured by an array of scintillation counter
hodoscopes. From the present experiment, it was
concluded that the reactions, gamma + "N" -> p + pi
and gamma + "pn" -> p + n, contribute dominantly to
the (gamma,p) reaction in this energy region, where
"N" denotes the nucleon and "pn" denotes the pn

The nuclear targets were 1H (hydrogen in water,
container of the distilled water made of mylar
films 127 micron thick, 200 mm in diameter, and
container made of mylar film 127 micron thick,
60 mm in diameter, and 123 mm long).
